zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Willoughby於1418年3月3日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維洛賀比 曼諾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Willoughby29歲，母親Margaret Freville18歲。她於大約1435年與Philip Boteler在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年3月3日在英國英格蘭肯特維其哈布奧享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Willoughby于1418年3月3日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維洛賀比 曼諾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Willoughby29岁，母亲Margaret Freville18岁。她于大约1435年与Philip Boteler在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年3月3日在英国英格兰肯特維其哈布奧享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Willoughby was born on 3 March 1418, in Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Willoughby, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Freville, was 18. She married Philip Boteler about 1435, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 3 March 1471, in Wickhambreaux, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Willoughby est née le 3 mars 1418, à Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Willoughby, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Freville, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Philip Boteler environ 1435, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1471, à Wickhambreaux, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Willoughby am 3. März 1418 in Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Willoughby 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Freville 18. Sie hat um 1435 in England, United Kingdom Philip Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. März 1471 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wickhambreaux, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Willoughby è nata il il 3 marzo 1418 nel Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh Willoughby, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret Freville, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Philip Boteler circa 1435, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1471, nel Wickhambreaux, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Willoughbyが1418年3月3日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビー マノーで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Willoughbyは29歳，母Margaret Frevilleは18歳であった。約1435年にイギリスイギリスでPhilip Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年3月3日にイギリスイギリスケントウィックハンブレアウックスで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Willoughby(이)가 1418년 3월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윌루그h비 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Willoughby(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Freville(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Philip Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 3월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 윅함브로스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.3 March 1418–3 March 1471: 3 de março de 1418–3 de março de 1471
pt.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Watton Woodhall, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Woodhall, Watton at Stone, Hertfordhsire: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, England: Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Willoughby nasceu em 3 de março de 1418, em Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Willoughby, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Freville, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip Boteler aproximadamente 1435, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de março de 1471, em Wickhambreaux, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Watton Woodhall, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.Woodhall, Watton, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Willoughby родилась 3 марта 1418 г. в местности уиллоугби манор, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Willoughby было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Freville, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip Boteler около 1435 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 3 марта 1471 г. в местности виккхамброкс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Willoughby nació el 3 de marzo de 1418, en Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Willoughby, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Freville, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Philip Boteler aproximadamente 1435, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1471, en Wickhambreaux, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
